mapper.select: Select STATUS_CD, TelNum From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS Where MemberID = #{memberID}
mapper.update: Update XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS SET STATUS_CD = #{STATUS_CD}, STATUS_NAME = #{STATUS_NAME}, PBX_CC_USER_STATUS_CD = #{PBX_CC_USER_STATUS_CD}, TelNum = #{TelNum}, useYN = #{useYN}, isManager = #{isManager}, MOD_DATE = GETDATE() Where MemberID = #{memberID}
mapper.select:
SET ANSI_WARNINGS OFF; SET ARITHIGNORE ON; SET ARITHABORT OFF;
Select (Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where STATUS_CD = '4' and useYN = 'Y') as 'callings', (Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where STATUS_CD in ('13','21') and useYN = 'Y') as 'working', (Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where STATUS_CD = '3' and useYN = 'Y') as 'standby', /*(Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where STATUS_CD NOT in ('4','15') and useYN = 'Y') as 'others',*/ (Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where STATUS_CD NOT in ('3','4','13','21') and useYN = 'Y') as 'others', /*20250424 기타상태 기준 변경*/ (Select count(*) From XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WITH(NOLOCK) Where useYN = 'Y') as 'total', (Select CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(CAST(B.complete as float)/CAST(A.total as float)*100 , 0) as VARCHAR), '%') From ( Select count(*) as 'total' From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WITH(NOLOCK) Where SRID in ( Select PID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WITH(NOLOCK) Where PID in (Select SRID From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where srType = 'REQ') And SpeCode = 'REQ0002') AND RegDT BETWEEN CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME))) /*20250424 오늘 일자 기준*/ ) A, ( Select count(*) as 'complete' From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK) Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) on ESM.SRID = ESA.SRID and ESA.AttrTypeCode= 'SRAT0098' and ESA.Value between '03' and '06' Where srType = 'REQ' And status = 'REQ0002' And Blocked = 2 AND RegDT BETWEEN CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME))) /*20250424 오늘 일자 기준*/ ) B) as 'endper', (Select CONCAT(ISNULL(CAST(ROUND(CAST(B.complete as float)/CAST(A.total as float)*100 , 0) as VARCHAR),0), '%') From ( Select count(*) as 'total' From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WITH(NOLOCK) Where SRID in ( Select PID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WITH(NOLOCK) Where PID in (Select SRID From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WITH(NOLOCK) Where srType = 'REQ') And SpeCode = 'REQ0002') And ReceiptUserID = #{memberID} AND RegDT BETWEEN CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME))) /*20250424 오늘 일자 기준*/ ) A, ( Select count(*) as 'complete' From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK) Left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) on ESM.SRID = ESA.SRID and ESA.AttrTypeCode= 'SRAT0098' and ESA.Value between '03' and '06' Where srType = 'REQ' And status = 'REQ0002' And Blocked = 2 And ReceiptUserID = #{memberID} AND RegDT BETWEEN CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(format(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DATETIME))) /*20250424 오늘 일자 기준*/ ) B) as 'ftper'

SELECT Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY CC_USR_EMP_NO ASC) as RNUM ,CC_USR_EMP_NO as CEMPNO ,CC_USER_NAME as CNAME ,STATUS_CD as STSCD ,STATUS_NAME as STSNAME ,PBX_CC_USER_STATUS_CD as PCUSTSCD ,REG_DATE as REGDATE ,MOD_DATE as MODDATE ,MemberID as MEMBERID ,ISNULL(TelNum, '') as TELNUM ,useYN as USEYN ,isManager as ISMANAGER FROM XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS
mapper.delete: delete XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS where MemberID = #{memberId} and STATUS_CD = #{statusCD}
mapper.select:
SELECT Distinct TM.MemberID , ISNULL(TM.Name,'')+ Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS Name , TM.LoginID, ISNULL(TM.Email,'') AS Email, ISNULL(TTC.Name, '') as CompanyName, ISNULL(TTT.Name,'') AS TeamName , TM.Authority, TM.RetireDate AS RetireDate, ISNULL(TM.Position,'') AS Position FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTC WITH(NOLOCK) on TM.CompanyID = TTC.TeamID AND TTC.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT WITH(NOLOCK) on TM.TeamID = TTT.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER_GR TMG WITH(NOLOCK) on TM.MemberID = TMG.MemberID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where TM.UserType = 1 And TM.Active = 1 And TMG.GroupID = 122
And TM.Authority < 4
Order by Name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO ( ID_USER, USER_NM, CD_DEPT, NM_DEPT, DEPT_FLAG, YN_MANAGER, CORP_ID, CORP_NAME, BIZ_KEY, MemberID ) VALUES( (SELECT LoginID From XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER WHERE memberID = #{memberID}), (SELECT Name From XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER WHERE memberID = #{memberID}), #{CD_DEPT}, #{NM_DEPT}, #{DEPT_FLAG}, #{YN_MANAGER}, #{CORP_ID}, #{CORP_NAME}, #{BIZ_KEY}, #{memberID} )
mapper.update:
Update XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO SET
YN_MANAGER = #{YN_MANAGER},
YN_MANAGER = NULL,
BIZ_KEY = #{BIZ_KEY},
BIZ_KEY = NULL,
MemberID = #{memberID} Where MemberID = #{memberID} AND CD_DEPT = #{CD_DEPT}
mapper.select: SELECT ReportCode, BatchName, SenderAcc, SenderName, SenderPwd, EmailSvrDomain, Subject, Body, Receiver, CC, DocumentID FROM XBOLTDLM.SEND_BATCH_MAIL

SELECT SRCode, SRID, SRType, Status FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(ESM.Duedate AS DATE), GETDATE()) > 15
AND Status IN ('ACM0009', 'ICM0007', 'SCM0008') AND ESM.CompletionDT IS NULL AND ESM.ClientID != '0000000008' AND ESM.Blocked = 0

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ClientName, TeamName, BIZName, MemberName ) AS RowNum , CORP_ID , ClientName , TeamName , BIZ_KEY , BIZName , MemberID , EmployeeNum , MemberName , SUM(TicketCount) AS TicketCount
, CAST(SUM(MSR_VAL) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS MSR_VAL , MAX(AVG_YN ) AS AVG_YN , SUM(ACMTicketCount ) AS ACMTicketCount , SUM(DCMTicketCount ) AS DCMTicketCount , SUM(ICMTicketCount ) AS ICMTicketCount , SUM(SCMTicketCount ) AS SCMTicketCount , SUM(INCTicketCount ) AS INCTicketCount , SUM(WRKTicketCount ) AS WRKTicketCount , SUM(DPLTicketCount ) AS DPLTicketCount , SUM(REQTicketCount1) AS REQTicketCount1 , SUM(REQTicketCount2) AS REQTicketCount2 , SUM(REQTicketCount3) AS REQTicketCount3 , SUM(ACMTime ) AS ACMTime , SUM(DCMTime ) AS DCMTime , SUM(ICMTime ) AS ICMTime , SUM(INCTime ) AS INCTime , SUM(SCMTime ) AS SCMTime , SUM(WRKTime ) AS WRKTime , SUM(DPLTime ) AS DPLTime , SUM(REQTime1 ) AS REQTime1 , SUM(REQTime2 ) AS REQTime2 , SUM(REQTime3 ) AS REQTime3
FROM
( SELECT TAB.CORP_ID, TAB.CORP_NAME AS ClientName, TAB.NM_DEPT AS TeamName, TAB.BIZ_KEY, TAB.BIZName AS BIZName, TAB.MemberID, TAB.EmployeeNum, TAB.MemberName, SUM(TAB.TicketCount) AS TicketCount, SUM(TAB.MSR_VAL) AS MSR_VAL, CASE WHEN (ISNULL(SUM(TAB.MSR_VAL), 0) < ROUND(AVG(ISNULL(SUM(TAB.MSR_VAL), 0)) OVER(), 2) AND ISNULL(SUM(TAB.TicketCount), 0) < ROUND(AVG(ISNULL(SUM(TAB.TicketCount), 0)) OVER(), 2)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AVG_YN, COUNT(TAB.ACMTicketCount) AS ACMTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.DCMTicketCount) AS DCMTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.ICMTicketCount) AS ICMTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.SCMTicketCount) AS SCMTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.INCTicketCount) AS INCTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.WRKTicketCount) AS WRKTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.DPLTicketCount) AS DPLTicketCount, COUNT(TAB.REQTicketCount1) AS REQTicketCount1, COUNT(TAB.REQTicketCount2) AS REQTicketCount2, COUNT(TAB.REQTicketCount3) AS REQTicketCount3, SUM(TAB.ACMTIME) AS ACMTime, SUM(TAB.DCMTIME) AS DCMTime, SUM(TAB.ICMTIME) AS ICMTime, SUM(TAB.INCTIME) AS INCTime, SUM(TAB.SCMTIME) AS SCMTime, SUM(TAB.WRKTIME) AS WRKTime, SUM(TAB.DPLTIME) AS DPLTime, SUM(TAB.REQTIME1) AS REQTime1, SUM(TAB.REQTIME2) AS REQTime2, SUM(TAB.REQTIME3) AS REQTime3 FROM (SELECT IDI.CORP_ID, IDI.CORP_NAME, IDI.CD_DEPT, IDI.NM_DEPT, TEAM1.TeamID, IDI.BIZ_KEY, TMT2.Name AS BIZName, EMR.MemberID, IDI.ID_USER, TM.EmployeeNum, TM.Name AS MemberName, 1 AS TicketCount, SUM(EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(EMR.OVERTIME) AS MSR_VAL, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'ACM' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS ACMTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'DCM' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS DCMTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'ICM' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS ICMTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'SCM' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS SCMTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'INC' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS INCTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'WRK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS WRKTicketCount, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'DPL' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS DPLTicketCount,
CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP000', 'RDT100') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount1, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP010', 'RDT110') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount2, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP020', 'RCP030', 'RDT120') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount3,
CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'ACM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS ACMTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'DCM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS DCMTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'ICM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS ICMTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'INC' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS INCTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'SCM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS SCMTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'WRK' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS WRKTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'DPL' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS DPLTIME, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP000', 'RDT100') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME1, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP010', 'RDT110') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME2, CASE WHEN MAX(EMR.SRType) = 'REQ' AND EMR.Category IN ('RCP020', 'RCP030', 'RDT120') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME3, EMR.SRType FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_MBR_RCD EMR WITH(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMR.MemberID = IDI.MemberID
And IDI.CORP_ID IN( select RefTeamCode From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TeamID IN (select TeamID from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST Where CustomerNo = #{customerNo} ))
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TEAM1.TeamCode = IDI.CD_DEPT AND TEAM1.Deleted != 1
And TEAM1.TeamID = #{teamID}
LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TEAM2.TeamCode = IDI.BIZ_KEY AND TEAM2.TeamType = 54
Left Outer JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMT2.TeamID = TEAM2.TeamID AND TMT2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER HASH JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = EMR.MemberID
WHERE WORK_DATE BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(#{endDate} AS DATETIME)))
AND ( EMR.business_hours + EMR.overtime ) > 0 AND ISNULL(EMR.SRArea1,'') != '' AND TM.Active = 1
AND EMR.ProjectID IN ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) ON TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID WHERE TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} AND TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
GROUP BY EMR.MemberID, EMR.SRType, TM.Name, EMR.Category, IDI.CORP_ID, IDI.CORP_NAME, IDI.CORP_ID, IDI.CD_DEPT, IDI.NM_DEPT, TEAM1.TeamID, IDI.ID_USER, TM.EmployeeNum, IDI.BIZ_KEY, TMT2.Name, EMR.SRID ) TAB GROUP BY TAB.MemberID, TAB.MemberName, TAB.CORP_NAME, TAB.CORP_ID, TAB.NM_DEPT, TAB.BIZ_KEY, TAB.EmployeeNum, TAB.BIZName ) rslt GROUP BY rslt.MemberID, rslt.MemberName, rslt.ClientName, rslt.CORP_ID, rslt.TeamName, rslt.BIZ_KEY, rslt.EmployeeNum, rslt.BIZName ORDER BY rslt.ClientName, rslt.TeamName, rslt.BIZName, rslt.MemberName

Select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TAB.SRAreaName,TAB.BIZName,TAB.MemberName ) AS RowNum, TAB.BIZ_KEY, TAB.BIZName AS BIZName, TAB.MemberID, TAB.EmployeeNum, TAB.MemberName, TAB.SRArea2, TAB.SRAreaName, TAB.Inhouse, Count(TAB.DaeCoTicketCount) AS DaeCoTicketCount, Count(TAB.NoDaeCoTicketCount) AS NoDaeCoTicketCount, SUM(TAB.DaeCoTime) AS DaeCoTime, SUM(TAB.NoDaeCoTime) AS NoDaeCoTime, SUM(TAB.TicketCount) AS TicketCount, SUM(TAB.MSR_VAL) AS MSR_VAL, Count(TAB.ACMTicketCount) AS ACMTicketCount, Count(TAB.DCMTicketCount) AS DCMTicketCount, Count(TAB.ICMTicketCount) AS ICMTicketCount, Count(TAB.SCMTicketCount) AS SCMTicketCount, Count(TAB.INCTicketCount) AS INCTicketCount, Count(TAB.WRKTicketCount) AS WRKTicketCount, Count(TAB.DPLTicketCount) AS DPLTicketCount, Count(TAB.REQTicketCount1) AS REQTicketCount1, Count(TAB.REQTicketCount2) AS REQTicketCount2, Count(TAB.REQTicketCount3) AS REQTicketCount3, SUM(TAB.ACMTIME) AS ACMTime, SUM(TAB.DCMTIME) AS DCMTime, SUM(TAB.ICMTIME) AS ICMTime, SUM(TAB.INCTIME) AS INCTime, SUM(TAB.SCMTIME) AS SCMTime, SUM(TAB.WRKTIME) AS WRKTime, SUM(TAB.DPLTIME) AS DPLTime, SUM(TAB.REQTIME1) AS REQTime1, SUM(TAB.REQTIME2) AS REQTime2, SUM(TAB.REQTIME3) AS REQTime3 From ( SELECT IDI.BIZ_KEY, TMT2.Name AS BIZName,
EMR.MemberID,IDI.ID_USER,TM.EmployeeNum, TM.Name AS MemberName, EMR.SRArea2, TIA.PlainText+'/'+TIA2.PlainText AS SRAreaName, TEAM2.Inhouse, CASE WHEN TEAM2.Inhouse = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS DaeCoTicketCount, CASE WHEN TEAM2.Inhouse != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS NoDaeCoTicketCount,
CASE WHEN TEAM2.Inhouse = 'Y' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS DaeCoTime, CASE WHEN TEAM2.Inhouse != 'Y' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS NoDaeCoTime,
(select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID ) AS TicketCount, SUM(EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(EMR.OVERTIME) AS MSR_VAL,
CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='ACM') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS ACMTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='DCM') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS DCMTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='ICM') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS ICMTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='SCM') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS SCMTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='INC') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS INCTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='WRK') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS WRKTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='DPL') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS DPLTicketCount, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='REQ' And EMR.Category = 'RCP000' ) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount1, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='REQ' And EMR.Category = 'RCP010') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount2, CASE WHEN (select COUNT(*) From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE SRID = EMR.SRID And SRType='REQ' And EMR.Category IN('RCP020','RCP030') ) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS REQTicketCount3,
CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'ACM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS ACMTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'DCM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS DCMTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'ICM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS ICMTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'INC' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS INCTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'SCM' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS SCMTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'WRK' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS WRKTIME, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'DPL' THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS DPLTIME,
CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'REQ' And EMR.Category IN('RCP000','RDT100') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME1, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'REQ' And EMR.Category IN('RCP010','RDT110') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME2, CASE WHEN EMR.SRType = 'REQ' And EMR.Category IN( 'RCP020','RCP030','RDT120') THEN SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(OVERTIME) ELSE 0 END AS REQTIME3, EMR.SRType
FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_MBR_RCD EMR WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMR.MemberID = IDI.MemberID LEFT OUTER Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TEAM2.TeamCode = IDI.BIZ_KEY And TeamType = 54 LEFT OUTER Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMT2.TeamID = TEAM2.TeamID And TMT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESM.SRID = EMR.SRID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = ESM.SRArea1 And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = ESM.SRArea2 And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = EMR.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TEAM1.TeamCode = IDI.CD_DEPT
Where CONVERT(varchar(10), EMR.WORK_DATE , 120) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} And EMR.MemberID = IDI.MemberID and TEAM1.Deleted != 1 And ISNULL(EMR.SRArea2,'') != ''
And IDI.CORP_ID IN( select RefTeamCode From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TeamID IN (select TeamID from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST Where CustomerNo = #{customerNo} ))
And TEAM1.TeamID = #{teamID}
AND ESM.ProjectID IN ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) ON TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID WHERE TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} AND TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
GROUP BY EMR.MemberID, EMR.SRType, TM.Name, EMR.Category, IDI.CORP_ID,IDI.CORP_NAME, IDI.CORP_ID,IDI.CD_DEPT, IDI.NM_DEPT, TEAM1.TeamID,IDI.ID_USER,TM.EmployeeNum, IDI.BIZ_KEY ,EMR.SRID,TMT2.Name,EMR.SRArea1,EMR.SRArea2,TIA.PlainText,TIA2.PlainText,TEAM2.Inhouse ) TAB Group By TAB.MemberID,TAB.MemberName,TAB.BIZ_KEY ,TAB.EmployeeNum,TAB.BIZName, TAB.SRArea2, TAB.SRAreaName,TAB.Inhouse ORDER BY TAB.SRAreaName,TAB.BIZName,TAB.MemberName

SELECT ISNULL(SUM(cntAll),0 ) AS TOTCNT, ISNULL(SUM(frCnt),0) AS FIRSTCNT, ISNULL(SUM(frSolCnt),0) AS FIRSTCOMPCNT, ISNULL(SUM(custoCnt),0) AS WKRREGCNT, CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(cntall), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Round(SUM(frCnt) * 100 / SUM(cntAll), 2) END AS FIRSTRCPTRATE, ISNULL( CASE WHEN SUM(frCnt) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Round(SUM(frSolCnt) * 100 / SUM(frCnt), 2) END ,0) AS FIRSTCOMPRATE,
ISNULL(SUM(seCnt),0) AS SECONDCNT, CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(cntAll),0) = 0 then 0 else round( SUM(seCnt)*100/SUM(cntAll),2) end AS SECONDRCPTRATE,
RefTeamCode, Max(Name) AS CORPNAME
FROM (
SELECT TT.RefTeamCode , TTT.Name ,ISNULL(COUNT(ESM.SRID),0) cntAll -- TOTAL
,ISNULL(COUNT(EAL1.ActivityLogID),0) frCnt , ISNULL(COUNT(EAL2.ActivityLogID),0) AS frSolCnt , ISNULL(COUNT(EAL4.ActivityLogID),0) custoCnt
,ISNULL(COUNT(EAL3.ActivityLogID),0) seCnt from XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT WITH(NOLOCK) left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TTT.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESM.ClientID = TT.ClientID AND TT.TeamType = 2 AND ESM.SRType = 'REQ' AND ESM.IsPublic = '1' And ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{endDate} AS DATETIME)))
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL ON EAL.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL.ActivityLogID = ( SELECT MAX(ActivityLogID) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = ESM.SRID ) AND EAL.Status NOT IN ('04','06','08')
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL1.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL1.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND EAL1.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND PID = ESM.SRID)
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL2.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL2.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND EAL2.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND PID = ESM.SRID) AND ESM.Status = 'REQ0002' AND ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL3.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL3.SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND EAL3.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND PID = ESM.SRID) AND EAL3.PID NOT IN ( SELECT PID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND PID = ESM.SRID )
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL4.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL4.SpeCode = 'REQ0001' AND EAL4.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0001' AND PID = ESM.SRID)
WHERE TT.TeamType = 2 AND TT.Deleted = 0 AND TT.RefTeamCode != 'ALL'
And TT.ClientID in ( SELECT TP.ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
GROUP BY TT.RefTeamCode , TTT.Name
union all
SELECT TT.RefTeamCode , TTT.Name , ISNULL(COUNT(ESM.SRID),0) cntAll ,0 frCnt ,0 frSolCnt ,0 custocnt ,ISNULL(COUNT(ESM.SRID),0) seCnt from XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT WITH(NOLOCK) left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TTT.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESM.ClientID = TT.ClientID AND TT.TeamType = 2 AND ESM.SRType NOT IN ('WRK','REQ') AND ESM.IsPublic = '1' And ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{endDate} AS DATETIME)))
left outer join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL ON EAL.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL.ActivityLogID = ( SELECT MAX(ActivityLogID) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = ESM.SRID ) AND EAL.Status NOT IN ('04','06','08')
WHERE TT.TeamType = 2 AND TT.Deleted = 0 AND TT.RefTeamCode != 'ALL'
And TT.ClientID in ( SELECT TP.ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK)on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
GROUP BY TT.RefTeamCode , TTT.Name ) A GROUP BY RefTeamCode ORDER BY RefTeamCode

WITH P_PARAM AS ( SELECT ISNULL('', '*') AS P_CORP_ID, #{startDate} AS P_START_DATE, #{endDate} AS P_END_DATE ), DateRange AS ( SELECT CAST(P_START_DATE + '-01' AS DATE) AS SDT, DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, 1, CAST(P_END_DATE + '-01' AS DATE))) AS EDT FROM P_PARAM ), DateSeries AS (
SELECT SDT, EDT, 0 AS rn FROM DateRange UNION ALL SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, SDT), EDT, rn + 1 FROM DateSeries WHERE DATEADD(DAY, 1, SDT) <= EDT ) SELECT * INTO #DateSeries FROM DateSeries OPTION (MAXRECURSION 0);
WITH REQDATA AS ( SELECT conDate, SUM(frCnt) - SUM(custoCnt) AS callCnt, SUM(custoCnt) AS eClickCnt, ROUND(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(frCnt), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(seCnt) * 100.0 / SUM(frCnt) END, 2) AS firstCompRate, SUM(CNTCALL) AS userCnt, ROUND(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(CNTCALL), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(frCnt) * 1.0 / SUM(CNTCALL) END, 2) AS callPerUser, ROUND(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(WORKDAY1), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(CNTCALL), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(frCnt) * 1.0 / SUM(CNTCALL) END, 2) / SUM(WORKDAY1) END, 2) AS dayCnt FROM (
SELECT FORMAT(VESM.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM') AS conDate, COUNT(1) AS frCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(VESM.REQ0004ActorID, '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS seCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(VESM.YN_PORTAL, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS custoCnt, 0 AS WORKDAY1, 0 AS CNTCALL FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_SR_REQUEST VESM LEFT JOIN XBOLTDLM.RELATIONS b ON b.HIGH_ID = VESM.SRCODE WHERE VESM.SRType = 'REQ' AND b.HIGH_ID IS NULL AND VESM.REQ0002ActorID != ''
AND VESM.ClientID = #{customerNo}
AND VESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} + '-01' AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS,-2,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CAST(#{endDate} + '-01'AS DATETIME))) GROUP BY FORMAT(VESM.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM')
UNION ALL
SELECT SUBSTRING(B.WORKDAY, 1, 7) AS conDate, 0, 0, 0, SUM(B.workday1), 0 FROM ( SELECT FORMAT(VESM.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS WORKDAY, 1 AS workday1 FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_SR_REQUEST VESM WHERE VESM.SRType = 'REQ' AND VESM.REQ0002ActorID != '' AND VESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} + '-01' AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS,-2,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CAST(#{endDate} + '-01'AS DATETIME))) GROUP BY FORMAT(VESM.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') ) B GROUP BY SUBSTRING(B.WORKDAY, 1, 7)
UNION ALL
SELECT conDate, 0, 0, 0, 0, SUM(C.callCnt) FROM ( SELECT FORMAT(VESM.regDT, 'yyyy-MM') AS conDate, VESM.REQ0002ActorID, 1 AS callCnt FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_SR_REQUEST VESM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = VESM.REQ0002ActorID WHERE VESM.SRType = 'REQ' AND VESM.REQ0002ActorID != '' AND ( TM.LoginID Is NULL OR TM.LoginID != 'T061115' ) AND TM.Active = '1' AND VESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} + '-01' AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS,-2,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CAST(#{endDate} + '-01'AS DATETIME))) GROUP BY FORMAT(VESM.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM'), VESM.REQ0002ActorID ) C GROUP BY conDate
UNION ALL
SELECT FORMAT(SDT, 'yyyy') + '-' + FORMAT(SDT, 'MM') AS conDate, 0 AS col1, 0 AS col2, 0 AS col3, 0 AS col4, 0 AS col5 FROM #DateSeries WHERE DATEPART(WEEKDAY, SDT) NOT IN (1, 7) GROUP BY FORMAT(SDT, 'yyyy'), FORMAT(SDT, 'MM') ) REQDATA GROUP BY conDate ) SELECT * INTO #REQDATA FROM REQDATA;
WITH PrevMonthData AS ( SELECT conDate, callCnt, eClickCnt, firstCompRate, userCnt, callPerUser, dayCnt, LAG(callCnt) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_callCnt, LAG(eClickCnt) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_eClickCnt, LAG(firstCompRate) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_firstCompRate, LAG(userCnt) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_userCnt, LAG(callPerUser) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_callPerUserRate, LAG(dayCnt) OVER (ORDER BY conDate) AS prev_dayCnt FROM #REQDATA ), FinalData AS ( SELECT conDate, callCnt, eClickCnt, firstCompRate, userCnt, callPerUser, dayCnt, prev_callCnt, prev_eClickCnt, prev_firstCompRate, prev_userCnt, prev_callPerUserRate, prev_dayCnt FROM PrevMonthData ) SELECT * INTO #FinalData FROM FinalData OPTION (MAXRECURSION 0);
SELECT conDate, CAST(callCnt AS INT) AS callCnt, CAST(eClickCnt AS INT) AS eClickCnt, CAST(firstCompRate AS INT) AS firstCompRate, CAST(userCnt AS INT) AS userCnt, CAST(callPerUser AS INT) AS callPerUser, CAST(dayCnt AS INT) AS dayCnt FROM #FinalData
UNION ALL
SELECT '전월 대비 증감률' AS conDate, CAST(ROUND(((callCnt - prev_callCnt) * 100.0 / prev_callCnt), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS callCnt, CAST(ROUND(((eClickCnt - prev_eClickCnt) * 100.0 / prev_eClickCnt), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS eClickCnt, CAST(ROUND(((firstCompRate - prev_firstCompRate) * 100.0 / prev_firstCompRate), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS firstCompRate, CAST(ROUND(((userCnt - prev_userCnt) * 100.0 / prev_userCnt), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS userCnt, CAST(ROUND(((callPerUser - prev_callPerUserRate) * 100.0 / prev_callPerUserRate), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS callPerUser, CAST(ROUND(((dayCnt - prev_dayCnt) * 100.0 / prev_dayCnt), 2) AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS dayCnt FROM #FinalData WHERE conDate = (SELECT MAX(conDate) FROM #FinalData) ORDER BY conDate
DROP TABLE #DateSeries DROP TABLE #REQDATA DROP TABLE #FinalData

SELECT SRCode ,CompanyNM , ISNULL(gubun,' ') as gubun , CASE WHEN Blocked = '2' THEN '종료' ELSE StatusNM END AS StatusNM , CategoryNM , ISNULL(fl_cat_name,' ') as fl_cat_name , cat_chg_yn , l1_name , l2_name , srAreaNM , Subject , Description , fl_desc , sl_desc , regDT , requestUserNM , requestUserTeamNM , ISNULL(FL_USR_NAME,'-') AS fl_usr_name , ISNULL(SL_USR_NAME,'-') AS sl_usr_name , ISNULL(mng_usr_name,'-') AS mng_usr_name , regUserNM from ( SELECT ESM.SRCode , CASE WHEN EAL1.ActivityLogID IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Blocked != 0 AND ESM.completionDT IS NOT NULL THEN '1차해결' WHEN EAL2.ActivityLogID IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Blocked != 0 AND ESM.completionDT IS NOT NULL THEN '2차해결' WHEN ESM.Status = 'REQ0004' AND ESM.Blocked = 2 AND EAL2.Status IN ('06') THEN '2차 종료' WHEN ESM.Status = 'REQ0004' AND ESM.Blocked = 0 AND EAL2.Status IN ('00','01','09') THEN '2차해결 중' WHEN ESM.Status = 'REQ0002' AND ESM.Blocked = 0 AND EAL1.Status IN ('00','01','09') THEN '1차해결 중' END AS gubun , ESM.Blocked , TIA3.PlainText AS StatusNM , TD1.Name + CASE WHEN ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') = '' THEN '' ELSE ' > ' + TD2.Name END AS CategoryNM
, CASE WHEN ISNULL(TD5.Name,'') = '' THEN TD4.Name ELSE TD5.Name + ' > ' + TD4.Name END AS fl_cat_name
, CASE WHEN ( ESM.SubCategory = EAL1.PrevSRCategory OR ESM.Category = EAL1.PrevSRCategory ) THEN 'X' WHEN ISNULL(EAL1.PrevSRCategory,'') = '' THEN ' ' WHEN ( ESM.SubCategory != EAL1.PrevSRCategory AND ESM.Category != EAL1.PrevSRCategory ) THEN 'Y' END AS cat_chg_yn
, TD3.Name AS l1_name , ISNULL(TATL2.Value,TATL1.Value) AS l2_name
, TIA1.PlainText + CASE WHEN ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'') = '' THEN '' ELSE ' > ' + TIA2.PlainText END AS srAreaNM
, ESM.Subject , ESM.Description
, ESA1.Value AS fl_desc , ESA2.Value AS sl_desc
, FORMAT(ESM.regDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') regDT
, TTT1.Name AS requestUserTeamNM , TM1.Name AS requestUserNM , TM2.Name AS regUserNM
, TM3.Name AS fl_usr_name , TM4.Name AS sl_usr_name , ISNULL(TM3.Name, TM4.Name ) as mng_usr_name
, TTT2.Name as CompanyNM
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM1.MemberID = ESM.RequestUserID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TTT1.TeamID = TM1.TeamID AND TTT1.LanguageID = #{languageID} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM2.MemberID = ESM.RegUserId
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.ClientID = ESM.ClientID AND TT.teamType = 2 INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TTT2.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TTT2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI1.ItemID = ESM.SRArea1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI2.ItemID = ESM.SRArea2 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA1.ItemID = TI1.ItemID AND TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = TI2.ItemID AND TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI3.Identifier = ESM.Status INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA3.ItemID = TI3.ItemID AND TIA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD1.TypeCode = ESM.Category AND TD1.Category = 'SRCAT' AND TD1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD2.TypeCode = ESM.SubCategory AND TD2.Category = 'SRCAT' AND TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD3.TypeCode = TI1.ClassCode AND TD3.Category = 'CLS' AND TD3.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL1.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL1.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND EAL1.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND PID = ESM.SRID) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL2.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL2.SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND EAL2.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND PID = ESM.SRID) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM3.MemberID = EAL1.ActorID AND TM3.Active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM4.MemberID = EAL2.ActorID AND TM4.Active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA1.SRID = ESM.SRID AND ESA1.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND ESA1.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA2.SRID = ESM.SRID AND ESA2.SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND ESA2.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0071'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA4.ItemID = TI1.ItemID AND TIA4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00088' AND TIA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA4.LovCode = TATL1.LovCode AND TATL1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TATL1.AttrTypeCode = TIA4.AttrTypeCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA5 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA5.ItemID = TI2.ItemID AND TIA5.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00088' AND TIA5.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA5.LovCode = TATL2.LovCode AND TATL2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TATL2.AttrTypeCode = TIA5.AttrTypeCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT ESC1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESC1.SRCatID = EAL1.PrevSRCategory LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT ESC2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESC2.SRCatID = ESC1.ParentID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD4.TypeCode = ESC1.SRCatID AND TD4.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD4.Category = 'SRCAT' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD5 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD5.TypeCode = ESC2.SRCatID AND TD5.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD5.Category = 'SRCAT'
WHERE ESM.SRType = 'REQ'
AND ( ESM.ClientID = #{customerNo} OR ESM.RequestUserId IN(SELECT MemberID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER WHERE ClientID = #{customerNo})) --DL이앤씨 0000000008 DL건설 0000000014
AND ESM.ClientID in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
And ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{endDate} AS DATETIME))) )T ORDER BY T.regDT desc OPTION (MAXDOP 1)

SELECT TTT2.Name As CompanyNM, ESM.SRCode, ISNULL(TD1.Name + CASE WHEN ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') = '' THEN '' ELSE ' > ' + TD2.Name END,'미분류') AS CategoryNM, TIA2.PlainText AS srAreaNM, TM1.Name requestUserNM, ISNULL(TM3.Name,'-') AS fl_usr_name, ISNULL(TM4.Name,'-') AS sl_usr_name, ISNULL((select max(nm_dept) from xboltdlm.ituser_dept_info where memberID = EAL2.ActorID),'-') AS cellName, FORMAT(ESM.regDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') RegDT, ISNULL(ESM.Subject,'-') as Subject , ISNULL(ESM.Description,'-') as Description , ISNULL(ISNULL(ESA1.Value, ESA2.Value),'-') AS dfcontent, CASE WHEN ESM.Blocked = '2' THEN '종료' ELSE TIA3.PlainText END AS StatusNM FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM WITH(NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM1.MemberID = ESM.RequestUserID AND TM1.Active = 1
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI3.Identifier = ESM.Status LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA3.ItemID = TI3.ItemID AND TIA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.ClientID = ESM.ClientID AND TT.teamType = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TTT2.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TTT2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD1.TypeCode = ESM.Category AND TD1.Category = 'SRCAT' AND TD1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD2.TypeCode = ESM.SubCategory AND TD2.Category = 'SRCAT' AND TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI1.ItemID = ESM.SRArea1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI2.ItemID = ESM.SRArea2 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA1.ItemID = TI1.ItemID AND TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = TI2.ItemID AND TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL1.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL1.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND EAL1.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND PID = ESM.SRID) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL2.PID = ESM.SRID AND EAL2.SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND EAL2.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND PID = ESM.SRID) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM3.MemberID = EAL1.ActorID AND TM3.Active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM4.MemberID = EAL2.ActorID AND TM4.Active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA1.SRID = ESM.SRID AND ESA1.SpeCode = 'REQ0002' AND ESA1.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA2.SRID = ESM.SRID AND ESA2.SpeCode = 'REQ0004' AND ESA2.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0071'
WHERE ESM.SRType = 'REQ'
AND ESM.ClientID = #{customerNo}
AND ESM.ClientID in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
And ESM.ProjectID in ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
And ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{endDate} AS DATETIME))) AND ESM.SubCategory IN ( 'RCP020101', 'RCP020102', 'RCP030101', 'RCP030102', 'RDT120100', 'RDT120101', 'RDT120102' ) ORDER BY TTT2.Name, ESM.RegDT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_OUTPUT_RCD SET MemberID = #{memberID}, ProcRoleTP = #{procRoleTP}, NEW_SCRIN_OUTPUT_QY = #{NEW_SCRIN_OUTPUT_QY}, NEW_BATCH_OUTPUT_QY = #{NEW_BATCH_OUTPUT_QY}, NEW_CONFIG_OUTPUT_QY = #{NEW_CONFIG_OUTPUT_QY}, NEW_DATA_OUTPUT_QY = #{NEW_DATA_OUTPUT_QY}, NEW_TABLE_OUTPUT_QY = #{NEW_TABLE_OUTPUT_QY}, NEW_SCRIN_OUTPUT_DTL = #{NEW_SCRIN_OUTPUT_DTL}, NEW_BATCH_OUTPUT_DTL = #{NEW_BATCH_OUTPUT_DTL}, NEW_CONFIG_OUTPUT_DTL = #{NEW_CONFIG_OUTPUT_DTL}, NEW_DATA_OUTPUT_DTL = #{NEW_DATA_OUTPUT_DTL}, NEW_TABLE_OUTPUT_DTL = #{NEW_TABLE_OUTPUT_DTL}, CHANGE_SCRIN_OUTPUT_QY = #{CHANGE_SCRIN_OUTPUT_QY}, CHANGE_BATCH_OUTPUT_QY = #{CHANGE_BATCH_OUTPUT_QY}, CHANGE_CONFIG_OUTPUT_QY = #{CHANGE_CONFIG_OUTPUT_QY}, CHANGE_DATA_OUTPUT_QY = #{CHANGE_DATA_OUTPUT_QY}, CHANGE_TABLE_OUTPUT_QY = #{CHANGE_TABLE_OUTPUT_QY}, CHANGE_SCRIN_OUTPUT_DTL = #{CHANGE_SCRIN_OUTPUT_DTL}, CHANGE_BATCH_OUTPUT_DTL = #{CHANGE_BATCH_OUTPUT_DTL}, CHANGE_CONFIG_OUTPUT_DTL = #{CHANGE_CONFIG_OUTPUT_DTL}, CHANGE_DATA_OUTPUT_DTL = #{CHANGE_DATA_OUTPUT_DTL}, CHANGE_TABLE_OUTPUT_DTL = #{CHANGE_TABLE_OUTPUT_DTL}, RESPONSE_SPEED = #{RESPONSE_SPEED}, BATCH_SPEED = #{BATCH_SPEED}, LastUser = #{lastUser}, LastUpdated = GETDATE() Where RCDID = #{rcdID}
mapper.select: SELECT TF.SEQ, TF.FileName, TF.FileRealName, TFT.FilePath + TF.FileName as SysFile, TFT.FilePath + TF.FileRealName as OrigFile, TFT.FilePath, TF.CreationTime, '.'+RIGHT(TF.FileRealName, CHARINDEX('.', REVERSE(TF.FileRealName)) - 1) AS FileExtension FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TF.FltpCode = TFT.FltpCode Where CONVERT(varchar(10), TF.CreationTime , 120) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.REG_DATE) AS RNUM , T1.ID , T1.TITLE , T1.REQ_USR_ID , T1.REQ_USR_NAME , T1.REG_DATE , T1.STATUS_ID , T1.STATUS_NAME , T1.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , T1.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , T1.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , T1.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , T1.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , T1.RVW_APPROVE_PID , T1.REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , T1.RVW_APP_OPIN , T1.DocTypeName , T1.DocTypeID , T1.SRID , T1.SpeCode , T1.ActivityLogID , T1.Category, T1.SubCategory , T1.ClientID , T1.ProjectID , T1.RequestUserID , T1.ActorID FROM (
SELECT APRV.ID , APRV.TITLE , APRV.REQ_USR_ID , APRV.REQ_USR_NAME , CONVERT(VARCHAR, APRV.REG_DATE, 120) AS REG_DATE , APRV.STATUS_ID , APRV.STATUS_NAME , APRV.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , APRV.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , APRV.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , APRV.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , APRV.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , APRV.RVW_APPROVE_PID , CASE WHEN ISNULL(APRV.REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN,'') ='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , CASE WHEN ISNULL(APRV.RVW_APP_OPIN,'') = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RVW_APP_OPIN , '요청부서 승인요청' AS DocTypeName , 1 AS DocTypeID , ESM.SRID , EAL.SpeCode , EAL.ActivityLogID , ESM.Category, ESM.SubCategory , ESM.ClientID , ESM.ProjectID , ESM.RequestUserID , EAL.ActorID FROM (SELECT ID , TITLE , CORP_ID , CORP_NAME , REQ_USR_ID , REQ_USR_NAME , REG_DATE , RCPT_USR_ID , RCPT_USR_NAME , RCPT_DATE , CLOSE_DATE , CLOSE_TYPE_ID , CLOSE_TYPE_NAME , PHASE_ID , PHASE_NAME , STATUS_ID , STATUS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , RVW_APPROVE_PID , REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , RVW_APP_OPIN FROM XBOLTDLM.AP_CHANGE UNION ALL SELECT ID , TITLE , CORP_ID , CORP_NAME , REQ_USR_ID , REQ_USR_NAME , REG_DATE , RCPT_USR_ID , RCPT_USR_NAME , RCPT_DATE , CLOSE_DATE , CLOSE_TYPE_ID , CLOSE_TYPE_NAME , PHASE_ID , PHASE_NAME , STATUS_ID , STATUS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PID , REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , NULL RVW_APP_OPIN FROM XBOLTDLM.DATA_CHANGE UNION ALL SELECT ID , TITLE , CORP_ID , CORP_NAME , REQ_USR_ID , REQ_USR_NAME , REG_DATE , RCPT_USR_ID , RCPT_USR_NAME , RCPT_DATE , CLOSE_DATE , CLOSE_TYPE_ID , CLOSE_TYPE_NAME , PHASE_ID , PHASE_NAME , STATUS_ID , STATUS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , NULL RVW_APPRPVE_PID , REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , NULL RVW_APP_OPIN FROM XBOLTDLM.INFRA_CHANGE UNION ALL SELECT ID , TITLE , CORP_ID , CORP_NAME , REQ_USR_ID , REQ_USR_NAME , REG_DATE , RCPT_USR_ID , RCPT_USR_NAME , RCPT_DATE , CLOSE_DATE , CLOSE_TYPE_ID , CLOSE_TYPE_NAME , PHASE_ID , PHASE_NAME , STATUS_ID , STATUS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , NULL RVW_APPROVE_PID , REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , NULL RVW_APP_OPIN FROM XBOLTDLM.SECURITY_CHANGE ) APRV INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM ON ESM.SRCode = APRV.ID INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL ON EAL.PID = ESM.SRID And EAL.SpeCode IN( 'ACM0005', 'DCM0003','ICM0003','SCM0003') WHERE ISNULL(REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID,'X') NOT IN('APP000103','APP000104','X') -- 승인/반려 아닌것 AND ISNULL(CLOSE_TYPE_ID, 'X') NOT IN('CLT000104', 'CLT000100') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, REG_DATE, 112) >= '20240101' And NOT EXISTS ( Select DocumentNo From XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST Where DocumentNo = APRV.ID And DocumentID = EAL.ActivityLogID ) UNION ALL SELECT RVW.ID , RVW.TITLE , RVW.REQ_USR_ID , RVW.REQ_USR_NAME , CONVERT(VARCHAR, RVW.REG_DATE, 120) AS REG_DATE , RVW.STATUS_ID , RVW.STATUS_NAME , RVW.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_ID , RVW.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , RVW.REQ_DEPT_APPROVE_PID , RVW.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID , RVW.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_NAME , RVW.RVW_APPROVE_PID , CASE WHEN ISNULL(RVW.REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN,'') ='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN , CASE WHEN ISNULL(RVW.RVW_APP_OPIN,'') = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RVW_APP_OPIN , '배포부서 승인요청' AS DocTypeName , 2 AS DocTypeID , ESM2.SRID , EAL2.SpeCode , EAL2.ActivityLogID , ESM2.Category, ESM2.SubCategory , ESM2.ClientID , ESM2.ProjectID , ESM2.RequestUserID , EAL2.ActorID FROM XBOLTDLM.AP_CHANGE RVW INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM2 ON ESM2.SRCODE = RVW.ID INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL2 ON EAL2.PID = ESM2.SRID And EAL2.SpeCode = 'ACM0010' WHERE ISNULL(RVW.RVW_APPROVE_PCS_ID,'X') NOT IN('APP000103','APP000104','X') -- 승인/반려 아닌것 AND ISNULL(RVW.CLOSE_TYPE_ID, 'X') NOT IN('CLT000104', 'CLT000100') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, RVW.REG_DATE, 112) >= '20240101' And NOT EXISTS ( Select DocumentNo From XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST Where DocumentNo = RVW.ID And DocumentID = EAL2.ActivityLogID ) ) T1 ORDER BY T1.REG_DATE

SELECT tif.FileName as filename , tif.FileRealName as original , CASE WHEN LEFT(FileName, 4) IN ('2018', '2019', '2020', '2021', '2022', '2023', '2024', '2025') THEN ISNULL(tif.FilePath,tft.FilePath) ELSE ISNULL(tft.FilePath,tif.FilePath) END + tif.FileName as downFile , CASE WHEN LEFT(FileName, 4) IN ('2018', '2019', '2020', '2021', '2022', '2023', '2024', '2025') THEN ISNULL(tif.FilePath,tft.FilePath) ELSE ISNULL(tft.FilePath,tif.FilePath) END AS FilePath FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE tif Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP tft On tif.FltpCode = tft.FltpCode WHERE tif.Seq = #{Seq}

WITH T AS ( SELECT IDI.CD_DEPT, IDI.DEPT_FLAG , TT1.TeamCode, TT2.TeamCode as SubTeam1, TT3.TeamCode SubTeam2 FROM xboltdlm.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.tb_team TT1 on TT1.teamCode = IDI.CD_DEPT LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.tb_team TT2 on TT2.parentID = TT1.teamID LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.tb_team TT3 on TT3.parentID = TT2.teamID WHERE IDI.CD_DEPT IN ( SELECT CD_DEPT FROM xboltdlm.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO WHERE YN_MANAGER = 'Y' AND MemberID = #{sessionUserId} ) GROUP BY IDI.CD_DEPT, IDI.DEPT_FLAG , TT1.TeamCode, TT2.TeamCode ,TT3.TeamCode ) SELECT DISTINCT MemberID From xboltdlm.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO WHERE CD_DEPT IN (SELECT TeamCode FROM T) OR CD_DEPT IN (SELECT SubTeam1 FROM T) OR CD_DEPT IN (SELECT SubTeam2 FROM T)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC) AS RNUM, FAQ_ID, URGNCY_YN, QESTN_SJ, RDCNT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 23) AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, CONVERT(VARCHAR, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 23) AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, NAME FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER As B ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.LoginID WHERE 1=1
AND ORGNZT_ID = #{projectID}
AND QESTN_SJ like '%'+#{searchValue}+'%'
AND QESTN_CN like '%'+#{searchValue}+'%'
AND URGNCY_YN = 'Y'
AND FAQ_TYPE = 'FAQ00001'
AND FAQ_TYPE = 'FAQ00002'
AND FAQ_TYPE = 'FAQ00003'

SELECT FAQ_ID, QESTN_SJ, QESTN_CN, ANSWER_CN, RDCNT, ATCH_FILE_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 23) AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 23) AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, ORGNZT_ID, FAQ_TYPE, URGNCY_YN FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO WHERE FAQ_ID=#{faqID}

SELECT FAQ_ID, QESTN_SJ, QESTN_CN, ANSWER_CN, RDCNT, ATCH_FILE_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 23) AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 23) AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, ORGNZT_ID, FAQ_TYPE, NAME, URGNCY_YN FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO AS A INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER As B ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.LoginID WHERE A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = #{FRST_REGISTER_ID} AND A.FAQ_ID = #{FAQ_ID};
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(FAQ_ID),'1') as FAQ_ID FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO SET RDCNT = ISNULL(RDCNT, 0) + 1, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM=GETDATE() WHERE FAQ_ID=#{faqID}
mapper.select:
SELECT CMST.CustomerNo AS CODE , TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CMST Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT on CMST.TeamID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE CMST.CustLvl = 'C'
And CMST.CustomerNo in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
AND CMST.CustomerNo = #{projectID} ORDER BY NAME
SELECT FRST_REGISTER_ID FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO WHERE FAQ_ID = #{faqID}
SELECT clientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT WHERE ProjectCode LIKE 'DLM%' AND clientID = #{ProjectID}
SELECT FRST_REGISTER_ID FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFAQINFO WHERE FAQ_ID=#{faqID}

SELECT TW1.RETURNEDVALUE PID1, TM1.NAME WFActorName1, ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TW1.LASTUPDATED, 23), '') WFDate1, TD1.NAME WFStatusNM1, TW1.Status Status1, TW2.RETURNEDVALUE PID2, TM2.NAME WFActorName2, ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TW2.LASTUPDATED, 23), '') WFDate2, TD2.NAME WFStatusNM2, TW2.Status Status2, ESM.REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST TW1 ON TW1.DOCUMENTNO = ESM.SRCODE AND ISNULL(TW1.APRVOPTION,'') = 'POST' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 ON TD1.TYPECODE = TW1.STATUS AND TD1.LANGUAGEID = #{languageID} AND TD1.CATEGORY = 'APRVSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM1 ON TM1.MEMBERID = TW1.LASTUSER
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST TW2 ON TW2.DOCUMENTNO = ESM.SRCODE AND ISNULL(TW2.APRVOPTION,'') != 'POST' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 ON TD2.TYPECODE = TW2.STATUS AND TD2.LANGUAGEID = #{languageID} AND TD2.CATEGORY = 'APRVSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM2 ON TM2.MEMBERID = TW2.LASTUSER
WHERE ESM.SRID = #{srID} order by isnull(TW1.Status,'') desc, isnull(TW2.Status,'') desc, isnull(TW1.ReturnedValue,'') desc, isnull(TW2.Returnedvalue,'') desc, TW1.LastUpdated desc, TW2.LastUpdated desc

SELECT TT.TeamID AS CODE , TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT on TT.TeamID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TT.TeamType = 50
And TT.TeamCode in ( SELECT T.RefTeamCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM T left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP ON T.ClientID = TP.ClientID left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} AND T.TeamType = 2 And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
ORDER BY TT.RefTeamCode, NAME

SELECT CMST.CustomerNo AS CODE , TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CMST Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT on CMST.TeamID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE CMST.CustLvl = 'C' AND CMST.CustomerNo = #{companyNm} ORDER BY NAME

SELECT TOP 0 MemberID,Name,LoginID INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX ix ON #TB_MEMBER_tmp(MemberID)
INSERT INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp SELECT MemberID,Name,LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
SELECT BB.CORP_ID AS CD_COMPANY , BB.CODE_NM AS CD_COMPANY_NM , BB.USR_ID AS USR_ID , TM2.Name AS USER_NM , BB.CD_DEPT AS CD_DEPT , BB.DS_DEPT AS NM_DEPT , TD.Name AS TBL_NM , AA.SRArea2 AS SVC_CI_ID , ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'') AS NAME_LV1 , CASE WHEN AA.Category != '' And AA.SubCategory != '' THEN ISNULL(TD1.Name,'') +'>'+ ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') ELSE '미분류' END AS CAT_NAME , AA.SRID , AA.RequestUserID AS REQ_USR_ID , TM.Name AS REQ_USR_NAME , AA.RequestTeamID AS REQ_USR_DEPT_ID , TXT.Name AS REQ_USR_DEPT_NAME , AA.SpeCode AS STATUS_ID , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS STATUS_NAME , AA.SRCode AS ID , ISNULL(AA.Subject,'') AS TITLE , ISNULL(AA.Description,'') AS NOTICE , ISNULL(ESA1.Value,'') AS SOLVNT , AA.WORK_DATE AS WORK_DATE , ( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME ) AS MSR_VAL , TM2.LoginID AS STEP_MNG_ID , ISNULL(TM2.Name,'') AS STEP_MNG_NM , FORMAT(AA.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS REG_DATE ,(select top 1 FORMAT(EndTime,'yyyy-MM-dd') from XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = AA.SRID And SpeCode = AA.SpeCode) AS CLOSE_DATE ,(select top 1 FORMAT(DueDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') from XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = AA.SRID And SpeCode = AA.SpeCode) AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE , (CASE WHEN AA.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(AA.DueDate AS DATE), CAST(AA.CompletionDT AS DATE)),0) ELSE 0 END) AS DELAY_YN , AA.DueDate AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE_TICKET , FORMAT(AA.CompletionDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CLOSE_DATE_TICKET , BUSINESS_HOURS as BUSINESS_HOUR , OVERTIME , HOLYDAY FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_MBR_RCD AA RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT ID_USER AS USR_ID , MemberID , MAX(USER_NM) AS USER_NM , MAX(CD_DEPT) AS CD_DEPT , MAX(NM_DEPT) AS DS_DEPT , MAX(CORP_ID) AS CORP_ID , MAX( TRIM(CORP_NAME) ) AS CODE_NM FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO GROUP BY ID_USER, MemberID ) BB ON AA.MemberID = BB.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = AA.SRType AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'SRTP' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = AA.SRArea2 And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD1.TypeCode = AA.Category AND TD1.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD2.TypeCode = AA.SubCategory And TD2.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = AA.RequestUserID LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM2.MemberID = AA.MemberID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM REQTEAM WITH(NOLOCK) ON REQTEAM.TeamID = AA.RequestTeamID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TXT.TeamID = AA.RequestTeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.SpeCode = TI.Identifier LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA1 ON ESA1.SRID = AA.SRID and ESA1.SpeCode = AA.SpeCode And ESA1.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0006','SRAT0001','SRAT0087','SRAT0071') WHERE ( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME ) > 0 AND AA.WORK_DATE BETWEEN FORMAT(CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND FORMAT(CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd')
And AA.ProjectID in ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) INNER join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
And REQTEAM.CompanyID IN (select Top 1 A.TeamID from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST A, XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM B Where A.TeamID = B.TeamID And A.CustomerNo = #{customerNo})
AND BB.CORP_ID IN ( select Top 1 ISNULL(B.RefTeamCode,'') from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST A, XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM B Where A.TeamID = B.TeamID And A.CustomerNo = #{customerNo})
DROP TABLE #TB_MEMBER_tmp

SELECT TOP 0 MemberID,Name,LoginID INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX ix ON #TB_MEMBER_tmp(MemberID)
INSERT INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp SELECT MemberID,Name,LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
SELECT BB.CORP_ID AS CD_COMPANY , BB.CODE_NM AS CD_COMPANY_NM , BB.USR_ID AS USR_ID , BB.USER_NM AS USER_NM , BB.CD_DEPT AS CD_DEPT , BB.DS_DEPT AS NM_DEPT , AA.SRID , TD.Name AS TBL_NM , AA.SRArea2 AS SVC_CI_ID , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TIASRAREA1.PlainText,'') !='' AND ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'') != '' THEN ISNULL(TIASRAREA1.PlainText,'') + '/' + ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'') ELSE ISNULL(TIASRAREA1.PlainText, '') + ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') END AS NAME_LV1 , CASE WHEN AA.Category != '' And AA.SubCategory != '' THEN ISNULL(TD1.Name,'') +'>'+ ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') ELSE '미분류' END AS CAT_NAME
, AA.RequestUserID AS REQ_USR_ID , TM.Name AS REQ_USR_NAME , AA.RequestTeamID AS REQ_USR_DEPT_ID , TXT.Name AS REQ_USR_DEPT_NAME
, AA.SpeCode AS STATUS_ID , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS STATUS_NAME , AA.SRCode AS ID , ISNULL(AA.Subject,'') AS TITLE , CASE WHEN AA.SRType = 'WRK' THEN ISNULL(EWA.Value,'') ELSE ISNULL(AA.Description,'') END AS NOTICE , ISNULL(ESA1.Value,'') AS SOLVNT
, AA.WORK_DATE AS WORK_DATE , ( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME ) AS MSR_VAL
, TM2.LoginID AS STEP_MNG_ID , ISNULL(TM2.Name,'') AS STEP_MNG_NM , FORMAT(AA.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS REG_DATE ,(select top 1 FORMAT(EndTime,'yyyy-MM-dd') from XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = AA.SRID And SpeCode = AA.SpeCode) AS CLOSE_DATE ,(select top 1 FORMAT(DueDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') from XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = AA.SRID And SpeCode = AA.SpeCode) AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE , (CASE WHEN AA.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(AA.DueDate AS DATE), CAST(AA.CompletionDT AS DATE)),0) ELSE 0 END) AS DELAY_YN , FORMAT(AA.DueDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE_TICKET , FORMAT(AA.CompletionDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CLOSE_DATE_TICKET , BUSINESS_HOURS as BUSINESS_HOUR , OVERTIME , HOLYDAY FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_MBR_RCD AA Left Outer Join ( SELECT ID_USER AS USR_ID , MemberID , MAX(USER_NM) AS USER_NM , MAX(CD_DEPT) AS CD_DEPT , MAX(NM_DEPT) AS DS_DEPT , MAX(CORP_ID) AS CORP_ID , MAX( TRIM(CORP_NAME) ) AS CODE_NM FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO GROUP BY ID_USER, MemberID ) BB ON AA.MemberID = BB.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = AA.SRType AND TD.LanguageID =1042 AND TD.Category = 'SRTP' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIASRAREA1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIASRAREA1.ItemID = AA.SRArea1 And TIASRAREA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIASRAREA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = AA.SRArea2 And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD1.TypeCode = AA.Category AND TD1.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD2.TypeCode = AA.SubCategory And TD2.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = AA.RequestUserID LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM2.MemberID = AA.MemberID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TXT.TeamID = AA.RequestTeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.SpeCode = TI.Identifier LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA1 ON ESA1.SRID = AA.SRID and ESA1.SpeCode = AA.SpeCode And ESA1.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0006','SRAT0001','SRAT0087','SRAT0071') LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTApp.ESM_WKS_ATTR EWA ON EWA.SRID = AA.SRID And EWA.SpeCode = AA.SpeCode And EWA.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0001'
WHERE ( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME ) > 0
And AA.ProjectID in ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) INNER join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
AND AA.WORK_DATE BETWEEN FORMAT(CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND FORMAT(CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd')
AND BB.CORP_ID = (select Top 1 ISNULL(B.RefTeamCode,'') from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST A, XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM B Where A.TeamID = B.TeamID And A.CustomerNo = #{customerNo})
And BB.CD_DEPT = (Select TeamCode From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM Where TeamID = #{teamID} )
DROP TABLE #TB_MEMBER_tmp

SELECT TOP 0 MemberID,Name,LoginID INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX ix ON #TB_MEMBER_tmp(MemberID)
INSERT INTO #TB_MEMBER_tmp SELECT MemberID,Name,LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER
SELECT MAX(BB.CORP_ID) AS CD_COMPANY , MAX(BB.CODE_NM) AS CD_COMPANY_NM , MAX(BB.USR_ID) AS USR_ID , MAX(BB.USER_NM) AS USER_NM , MAX(BB.CD_DEPT) AS CD_DEPT , MAX(BB.DS_DEPT) AS NM_DEPT
, MAX(AA.SRID) AS SRID , MAX(TD.Name) AS TBL_NM , MAX(AA.SRArea2) AS SVC_CI_ID , MAX(ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'')) AS NAME_LV1 , MAX(CASE WHEN AA.Category != '' And AA.SubCategory != '' THEN ISNULL(TD1.Name,'') +'>'+ ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') ELSE '미분류' END) AS CAT_NAME , MAX(AA.RequestUserID) AS REQ_USR_ID , MAX(TM.Name) AS REQ_USR_NAME , MAX(AA.RequestTeamID) AS REQ_USR_DEPT_ID , MAX(TXT.Name) AS REQ_USR_DEPT_NAME
, MAX(AA.SpeCode) AS STATUS_ID , MAX(ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'')) AS STATUS_NAME , MAX(AA.SRCode) AS ID , MAX(ISNULL(AA.Subject,'')) AS TITLE , MAX(ISNULL(AA.Description,'')) AS NOTICE , MAX(ISNULL(ESA1.Value,'')) AS SOLVNT
, SUM(( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME )) AS MSR_VAL
, MAX(TM2.LoginID) AS STEP_MNG_ID , MAX(ISNULL(TM2.Name,'')) AS STEP_MNG_NM , MAX(FORMAT(AA.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS REG_DATE , MAX(FORMAT(EAL.EndTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS CLOSE_DATE , MAX(FORMAT(EAL.DueDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE
, MAX((CASE WHEN AA.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(AA.DueDate AS DATE), CAST(AA.CompletionDT AS DATE)),0) ELSE 0 END)) AS DELAY_YN , MAX(FORMAT(AA.DueDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS COMP_CHANGE_DUE_DATE_TICKET , MAX(FORMAT(AA.CompletionDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS CLOSE_DATE_TICKET FROM XBOLTAPP.VW_ESM_MBR_RCD AA Left Outer Join ( SELECT ID_USER AS USR_ID , MemberID , MAX(USER_NM) AS USER_NM , MAX(CD_DEPT) AS CD_DEPT , MAX(NM_DEPT) AS DS_DEPT , MAX(CORP_ID) AS CORP_ID , MAX( TRIM(CORP_NAME) ) AS CODE_NM FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO GROUP BY ID_USER, MemberID ) BB ON AA.MemberID = BB.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = AA.SRType AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'SRTP' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = AA.SRArea2 And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD1 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD1.TypeCode = AA.Category AND TD1.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD2.TypeCode = AA.SubCategory And TD2.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = AA.RequestUserID LEFT OUTER JOIN #TB_MEMBER_tmp TM2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM2.MemberID = AA.MemberID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TXT.TeamID = AA.RequestTeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.SpeCode = TI.Identifier LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA1 ON ESA1.SRID = AA.SRID and ESA1.SpeCode = AA.SpeCode And ESA1.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0006','SRAT0001','SRAT0087','SRAT0071')
LEFT JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL ON EAL.PID = AA.SRID AND EAL.SpeCode = AA.SpeCode
WHERE ( AA.BUSINESS_HOURS + AA.OVERTIME ) > 0
And AA.ProjectID in ( SELECT TP.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP WITH(NOLOCK) INNER join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR WITH(NOLOCK) on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
AND AA.WORK_DATE BETWEEN FORMAT(CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND FORMAT(CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd')
AND BB.CORP_ID = (select Top 1 ISNULL(B.RefTeamCode,'') from XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST A, XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM B Where A.TeamID = B.TeamID And A.CustomerNo = #{customerNo})
And BB.CD_DEPT = (Select TeamCode From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM Where TeamID = #{teamID} )
GROUP BY AA.SRCode, AA.SpeCode, BB.USR_ID ORDER BY 1, AA.SRCode, AA.SpeCode, BB.USR_ID
DROP TABLE #TB_MEMBER_tmp

CREATE TABLE #temp_result ( headerkey varchar(100), headerValue varchar(200), );
INSERT INTO #temp_result (headerkey,headerValue) VALUES ('_startTime', '_시작일시'), ('_endTime', '_완료일시'), ('_MH1', '_실적(업무내)'), ('_MH2', '_실적(업무외)'), ('_procRoleInfo', '_담당그룹'), ('_actorInfo', '_담당자'),('_actorTeamInfo', '_담당 부서');
SELECT TI.Identifier + tmp.headerkey HeaderKey, REPLACE(TIA.PlainText + tmp.headerValue,',','/') HeaderName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' CROSS JOIN #temp_result tmp
TI.ClassCode = 'CL03004' AND TI.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND TI.Deleted != 1
AND TI.Identifier LIKE N'%'+#{srType}+'%'
AND TI.Identifier NOT IN ('REQ0003','REQ0005','REQ0006') AND TI.Identifier NOT LIKE '%0001%'
UNION
SELECT TI.Identifier + '_' + EAAT.AttrTypeCode HeaderKey, REPLACE(TIA.PlainText + '_' + TD.Name,',','/') HeaderName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_ATTR_TYPE EAAT ON EAAT.SpeCode = TI.Identifier INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = EAAT.AttrTypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID}
TI.ClassCode = 'CL03004' AND TI.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND TI.Deleted != 1
AND TI.Identifier LIKE N'%'+#{srType}+'%'
AND TI.Identifier NOT IN ('REQ0003','REQ0005','REQ0006')
ORDER BY HeaderKey
DROP TABLE #temp_result

CREATE TABLE #temp_result ( SRID bigint );
INSERT INTO #temp_result (SRID) VALUES
(#{srid})
SELECT TSM.SRID, 'Description' AS HeaderKey, TSM.Description AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST TSM INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = TSM.SRID
UNION
SELECT ESA.SRID, ESA.SpeCode + '_' + ESA.AttrTypeCode AS HeaderKey, ISNULL(TATL.Value,ESA.Value) AS Value
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_WKS_ATTR ESA
INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = ESA.SRID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL ON TATL.AttrTypeCode = ESA.AttrTypeCode AND TATL.LovCode = ESA.LovCode AND ESA.LovCode IS NOT NULL AND TATL.LanguageID = #{languageID}
UNION
SELECT EAL.PID AS SRID, SpeCode + '_startTime' AS HeaderKey, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), StartTime, 23) AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EAL.PID WHERE Status != '07' AND SpeCode != 'ZSPE00'
UNION
SELECT EAL.PID AS SRID, SpeCode + '_endTime' AS HeaderKey, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), EndTime, 23) AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EAL.PID WHERE Status != '07' AND SpeCode != 'ZSPE00'
UNION
SELECT EAL.PID AS SRID, SpeCode + '_procRoleInfo' AS HeaderKey, TD.Name AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EAL.PID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = EAL.ProcRoleTP WHERE Status != '07' AND SpeCode != 'ZSPE00'
UNION
SELECT EAL.PID AS SRID, SpeCode + '_actorInfo' AS HeaderKey, TM.Name + '(' + TM.LoginID + ')' AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EAL.PID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = EAL.ActorID WHERE Status != '07' AND SpeCode != 'ZSPE00'
UNION
SELECT EAL.PID AS SRID, SpeCode + '_actorTeamInfo' AS HeaderKey, TXT.Name + '(' + TXT.TeamCode + ')' AS Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EAL.PID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT ON TXT.TeamID = EAL.TeamID AND TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE Status != '07' AND SpeCode != 'ZSPE00'
UNION
SELECT EMR.SRID, SpeCode + '_MH1' as HeaderKey, CAST(SUM(BUSINESS_HOURS) AS VARCHAR) AS Value from XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD EMR INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EMR.SRID GROUP BY BUSINESS_HOURS, SpeCode, EMR.SRID
UNION
SELECT EMR.SRID, SpeCode + '_MH2' as HeaderKey, CAST(SUM(OVERTIME) AS VARCHAR) AS Value from XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD EMR INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EMR.SRID GROUP BY BUSINESS_HOURS, SpeCode, EMR.SRID
UNION
SELECT EES.DocumentID, 'ZSPE00_' + EEIV.AttrTypeCode as HeaderKey, EEIV.Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_EVAL_SHEET EES INNER JOIN #temp_result tmp ON tmp.SRID = EES.DocumentID INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_EVAL_ITEM_VALUE EEIV ON EES.EvalSheetID = EEIV.EvalSheetID
DROP TABLE #temp_result
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.CDR (CallID, LineType, SliNum, GrpName, AgtID, AgtName, TrkNum, SDate, STime, SWeek, SangdamSec, CustWaitSec, TotalUseSec, IO, CallResult, GrpType, SMDR, TelNum, DNIS, TransferNum, AgtCnt, TransferCnt, ConferenceCnt, Reserved_1, Reserved_2, Reserved_3, Reserved_4, Reserved_5 ) VALUES
( #{cti.CallID}, #{cti.LineType}, #{cti.SliNum}, #{cti.GrpName}, #{cti.AgtID}, #{cti.AgtName}, #{cti.TrkNum}, #{cti.SDate}, #{cti.STime}, #{cti.SWeek}, #{cti.SangdamSec}, #{cti.CustWaitSec}, #{cti.TotalUseSec}, #{cti.IO}, #{cti.CallResult}, #{cti.GrpType}, #{cti.SMDR}, #{cti.TelNum}, #{cti.DNIS}, #{cti.TransferNum}, #{cti.AgtCnt}, #{cti.TransferCnt}, #{cti.ConferenceCnt}, #{cti.Reserved_1}, #{cti.Reserved_2}, #{cti.Reserved_3}, #{cti.Reserved_4}, #{cti.Reserved_5} )
mapper.select:
WITH WF_ROWS AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TWI.DocumentID ASC) AS RN, ISNULL(TWI.ReturnedValue,'') AS ReturnedValue, ISNULL(TM.Name,'') AS WFActorName, ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TWI.LASTUPDATED, 23), '') AS WFDate, ISNULL(TD.Name,'') AS StatusName, ISNULL(TWI.Status,'') AS Status, ESM.REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN, 'Read' AS Mode, ISNULL(TWI.GWProcessID,'') AS ProcessID, CASE WHEN TWI.Status IN ('-1','0','4') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS HasLink, CASE WHEN TWI.Status = '0' THEN (select Top 1 Name From XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY Where TypeCode ='ZLN0030' and LanguageID = #{languageID} And Category ='ERRTP') WHEN TWI.Status = '4' THEN (select Top 1 Name From XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY Where TypeCode ='ZLN0030' and LanguageID = #{languageID} And Category ='ERRTP') ELSE '' END AS WFMsg FROM XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST TWI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TYPECODE = TWI.STATUS AND TD.LANGUAGEID = #{languageID} AND TD.CATEGORY = 'APRVSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MEMBERID = TWI.LASTUSER LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM ON TWI.DocumentNo = ESM.SRCode WHERE TWI.DocumentNo = #{srCode} ) SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN ReturnedValue END) AS PID1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN ReturnedValue END) AS PID2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN WFActorName END) AS WFActorName1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN WFActorName END) AS WFActorName2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN WFDate END) AS WFDate1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN WFDate END) AS WFDate2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN StatusName END) AS WFStatusNM1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN StatusName END) AS WFStatusNM2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN Status END) AS Status1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN Status END) AS Status2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN Mode END) AS Mode1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN Mode END) AS Mode2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN ProcessID END) AS ProcessID1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN ProcessID END) AS ProcessID2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN HasLink END) AS HasLink1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN HasLink END) AS HasLink2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN WFMsg END) AS WFMsg1, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN WFMsg END) AS WFMsg2, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN END) AS REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN, MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN END) AS REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN
FROM WF_ROWS WHERE RN <= 2

SELECT T.SRAreaName, T.RoleName, T.SRTypeName, T.RoleMemberName, T.ClassCode , T.ProcessType FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TIA.PlainText, ORT.ProcessType COLLATE Latin1_General_BIN) AS id , TIA.PlainText SRAreaName , TD.Name RoleName , TD2.Name SRTypeName , TI.ClassCode , ORT.ProcessType , STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ORT.RoleTypeCode = 'WGRICM102' THEN IDI.USER_NM ELSE TM.NAME END, ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN ORT.RoleTypeCode = 'WGRICM102' THEN IDI.USER_NM ELSE TM.NAME END) AS RoleMemberName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT1.TeamID = TI.CompanyID AND TT1.TeamType = 2 INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT1.RefTeamCode = TT2.TeamCode AND TT2.TeamType = 50
CROSS JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_OLM_ROLE_TYPE ORT WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = ORT.RoleTypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'SRROLETP' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD2.TypeCode = ORT.ProcessType AND TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD2.Category = 'SRTP'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM TMI WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMI.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TMI.RoleType = ORT.RoleTypeCode AND TMI.Assigned = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = TMI.MemberID AND TM.Active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI WITH(NOLOCK) ON IDI.memberID = TMI.MemberID
WHERE TI.Deleted = 0 AND ORT.AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' AND ORT.RoleTypeCode != 'WGRREQ100' AND ORT.ProcessType != 'PBM' AND TI.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00004' AND TI.ClassCode IN ( 'CL04001','CL04002')
AND TT2.TeamID = #{companyID}
AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM WHERE MemberID IN ( SELECT MemberID FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT ON IDI.CD_DEPT = TT.TeamCode And TT.TeamID=#{deptID}) )
AND TI.ItemID = #{srArea} AND TMI.RoleType = #{roleType} AND ORT.ProcessType = #{srType}
And TT1.ClientID in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR')
GROUP BY TMI.RoleType, TIA.PlainText , TD2.Name, TD.Name , TI.ItemID, TT1.refTeamCode , ORT.ProcessType , TI.ClassCode ) T WHERE (T.ClassCode != 'CL04001' OR T.RoleMemberName IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY T.SRAreaName, T.ClassCode, T.ProcessType COLLATE Latin1_General_BIN

Select Case When Count(*) > 0 Then 'Y' Else 'N' END AS isMyProcRoleTPGroup From XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM TMI Inner Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM ON ESM.SRArea2 = TMI.ItemID Where ESM.SRID = #{srID} And TMI.AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' And TMI.Assigned = 1 And TMI.MemberID = #{sessionUserID}

Select Case When Count(*) > 0 Then 'Y' Else 'N' END AS isMyRegion From XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL Inner Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST TSM ON TSM.SRID = EAL.PID Where EAL.PID = #{srID} AND TSM.CustGRNO in ( SELECT TP2.ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP2 ON TP2.ProjectID = TP.ParentID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{sessionUserID} And TP.ProjectType = 'PJT' AND TP2.ProjectType = 'PG' )
